name: RustyClawRouter
description: Solana-native LLM routing with x402 micropayments via BlockRun

gatewayUrl.description: RustyClawRouter gateway URL (overrides LLM_ROUTER_API_URL env var)

walletKey.description: Base58-encoded Solana private key for x402 payments (overrides LLM_ROUTER_WALLET_KEY env var)

defaultModel.description: Default model ID to use when none is specified (default: auto)
